title: Corporate Advisory & Structuring
summary: Company incorporation, structuring, IPO support, and full-lifecycle corporate governance.
bullets: Company & LLP Incorporation in India and Entity set-up
Entry strategy for foreign businesses and IP Protection
Post-incorporation compliances (Record Maintenance, Regulatory/Secretarial/Sectoral)
Corporate structuring, capital alteration, joint ventures, and financial restructuring
Insider Trading health checks and ongoing corporate governance
IPO lifecycle support (virtual data rooms, standard certificates, coordinate with BRLMs, offer document reviews)
Direct and Indirect Taxation advisory

title: Venture Capital, Private Equity & Fundraiser
summary: Angel/Seed investments, term sheets, share purchase agreements, and founder equity structuring.
bullets: Angel, seed, growth-stage, and late-stage investments
Drafting and negotiation of term sheets
Share subscription, share purchase, and shareholders’ agreements
Founder arrangements and equity structuring
FEMA and FDI compliance for inbound and outbound investments
Post-closing filings and ongoing regulatory support

title: Mergers & Acquisitions
summary: End-to-end M&A advisory, buy-side/sell-side due diligence, and cross-border transactions.
bullets: End-to-end advisory on mergers, acquisitions, divestments, restructurings, and exit transactions
Transaction structuring, including share purchases, asset transfers, slump sales, and schemes of arrangement
Buy-side and sell-side legal due diligence, including risk identification and mitigation
Drafting, review, and negotiation of transaction documents (term sheets, SHA, SPA, SSA, etc.)
Regulatory advisory, including Companies Act, SEBI, FEMA, and competition law compliances
Cross-border transaction support, including structuring and approvals
Advisory on joint ventures, strategic alliances, and investment structuring
Deal execution support, including conditions precedent, closing, and post-closing compliances
Integration advisory, including corporate restructuring and governance alignment

title: Loans & Debt Financing
summary: Secured and unsecured loan advisory, venture debt, and comprehensive transaction support.
bullets: Advisory on secured and unsecured lending arrangements
Venture debt, structured debt, and working capital facilities
Drafting and negotiating loan agreements, security documents, and guarantees
Lender and borrower-side transaction advisory
Regulatory and compliance framework relative to debt transactions

title: Commercial Contracts
summary: End-to-end contracting strategy, drafting MSAs/SLAs, and SaaS licensing arrangements.
bullets: End-to-end advisory on commercial contracting strategy, structuring, and lifecycle management
Drafting, review, and negotiation of Master Service Agreements (MSA) and Service Level Agreements (SLA)
SaaS, technology, licensing, and data-driven commercial arrangements
Vendor, procurement, supply, outsourcing, and service contracts
Distribution, franchise, channel partner, and commercial agency arrangements
Consultancy, non-disclosure, confidentiality, and data protection agreements
Standardisation, templating, and contract management frameworks for operational efficiency
Contract risk allocation, liability structuring, and indemnity frameworks
Negotiation support for complex and high-value commercial arrangements
Compliance alignment with applicable laws including IT, data protection, and sector-specific regulations
Dispute prevention structuring, including termination, exit, and enforcement mechanism

title: Employment Law
summary: ESOP structuring, employment agreements, HR policy advisory, and POSH frameworks.
bullets: Drafting and review of employment agreements, offer letters, and consultancy arrangements
Advisory on employment law compliance, HR policies, and POSH frameworks
ESOP structuring, RSU (Restricted Stock Units), SAR (Stock Appreciation Rights) documentation and implementation
Advisory on workforce structuring, exits, terminations, and separation documentation

title: Regulatory Compliance & Risk Management
summary: FEMA, GIFT City structuring, data protection (DPDP), and Global Capability Centres (GCCs).
bullets: Advisory on regulatory frameworks including FEMA, FDI Policy, Overseas Investment (OI) Rules, Companies Act, Contract Act, and allied laws
Advisory on GIFT City (IFSC) structuring, regulatory compliance, and operational frameworks
Data protection and privacy advisory, including compliance with the Digital Personal Data Protection (DPDP) Act
Advisory on Global Capability Centres (GCCs), including structuring, regulatory positioning, and operational compliance
Corporate governance and board-level advisory, including policy framework and compliance reviews
Ongoing compliance management, risk assessment, and regulatory monitoring
Advisory and support for statutory, regulatory, and sector-specific filings and approvals

title: Due Diligence Report
summary: Comprehensive legal, secretarial, and financial audits for investments and M&A deals.
bullets: Comprehensive Legal, Secretarial, and Financial Due Diligence
Transactional due diligence for investments, debt financing, and M&A transactions
Contractual and regulatory risk assessment audits
Issue-based due diligence reports supported by practical remediation guidance

title: Dispute & Pre-Litigation Support
summary: Pre-litigation strategy, contractual dispute advisory, and settlement negotiations.
bullets: Advisory on complex contractual and employment-related disputes
Drafting and negotiation of settlement and separation agreements
Robust pre-litigation strategy to mitigate cost and timeline risks
Risk evaluation, assessment, and dispute management support

title: Business Valuation
summary: Statutory valuation for share issuance, IBC proceedings, and Ind AS 113 fair value assessments.
bullets: Business Valuation of Securities or Financial Assets (SFA)
Valuation required for share issuance, buybacks, amalgamation, and demergers
Statutory valuation services for Insolvency & Bankruptcy Law (IBC)
Determination of fair value of investments under Ind As 113

title: Representation before Authorities
summary: Strategic representation before NCLT, ROC, SEBI, and various High Courts across India.
bullets: Registrar of Companies (ROC) and Regional Director (RD) proceedings
National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) & NCLAT representation
Debt Recovery Tribunal (DRT & DRAT) and High Court matters
Securities & Exchange Board of India (SEBI) & Economic Offense Court
Arbitration representation and strategic litigation guidance

title: Bankruptcy & Insolvency (IBC, 2016)
summary: CIRP advisory, resolution plan support, and representation before NCLT/NCLAT.
bullets: Advisory on insolvency strategy, including pre-admission and post-admission stages
Advisory for Financial Creditors, Operational Creditors, and Corporate Debtors
Drafting and review of applications for initiation of CIRP
Support in preparation and review of Resolution Plans
Advisory on Liquidation process, including distribution of assets and priority of claims
Assisting Resolution Professionals (RP) in legal and secretarial compliance during CIRP
Due diligence on the Corporate Debtor to identify potential legal and financial risks
Representation before NCLT and NCLAT in insolvency and bankruptcy matters
Drafting and vetting of transactional documents related to distressed asset acquisitions
Advisory on Voluntary Liquidation and strike-off processes for solvent companies
Cross-border insolvency advisory and coordination with international stakeholders
